description: Create a reusable work item template named 'Frontend Bug Report' for the 'TailwindTraders' project in Azure DevOps to standardize bug reporting. Configure the template to pre-fill the Title as '[Frontend] <short description>', Priority as 2, Severity as '2 - High', Area Path as 'TailwindTraders', and Tags as 'frontend' and 'needs-triage'. The Repro Steps or Description field must include a markdown template with the following headers: '**Environment:**', '**Steps to Reproduce:**', '**Expected Result:**', and '**Actual Result:**'. Save the template so it is available for the team.
